transcript.text: I wanted to connect on the sitemap thing last week.
So I was just looking at the search console right now.
We still have like some three sitemaps.
One is about the overall structure of the website, then a sitemap for all the blocks.
So these are two maps that we have right now.
And one is the entire website.
So this is fine.
This is great.
Can we add some new sitemaps for the vernacular, French, and Spanish, or whatever languages we are working on?
Yes, I think that's definitely a fair call out.
The only thing I would say is maybe we want to give some more time to that.
I mean, I know obviously there's a, like an opportunity cost here because getting those pages indexed is obviously going to benefit us.
But Yeah.
Very great.
A low percentage of the site is translated right now, so I don't necessarily want to index pages that are technically in English, but exist on the Spanish domain, for example.
So I think that's a totally fair call-out.

I think our main concern is just having a subset of pages ready for Shop Talk, because the visitors that come into these translated pages, like the French and Spanish site, are mostly going to be direct traffic that have been sent there from attending the event.
So I don't think our primary concern as of right now is, like, optimizing for search traffic on those domains, although you're right to call it out.
Like, you're absolutely, we should do that event.
I just think we should wait until more of the site...

It's translated before building a sitemap, because, yeah, I just don't, it'll be not a good experience if, you know, they're sent to a page that they expect to be in their native language, but it isn't ready yet.
But, yeah, let me make a note of that so that it's on my list of action items, maybe for the next couple weeks.
Quick question, one quick question.
Do we have a Japanese version also?
So, let me double check.
Again, I see them doing work in the Japanese locale all the time.
However, publishing on the Japanese locale is still disabled, so they haven't launched any pages yet, which is interesting.
Because I'm getting a lot of searches in Japanese, and if you're not searching the, if you're not serving the right website, then it could lead to bad user experience.
Yeah, for sure.
mean, definitely.

If is a Japan Firework website, I just think it must not be, like, what is on the front end, I don't think is going to be seen, because, like, I guess what I'm trying, sorry, it's what you're seeing on the front end is not Webflow.
Like, they must be using some other platform.
I don't know if it's, like, WordPress, or they have, like, a developer or something.
No, no, I didn't mean that.
Let me just share my screen.
Sure.
What I meant is, the searches in Google search, right?
My screen is visible.
So what's happening is, in Japan, we have some 296 clicks, then we have, this is also, I guess, Japanese, then we have, this is Japanese, like, 93 clicks, and here we have 163 clicks, these are pure.
So what we could do is, let's not, let's not even go to French and Spanish, but at least cover the Japanese.
So the people who are searching in Japanese, we should serve them the Japanese website.
That research experience is intact.
Okay.
Like, I agree, of course.
I just don't have any control over the current Japanese Firework website.
So that would probably be something that they would need to do.
So you, are you, sorry, what, if I can send them an action item, but let, like, can that be distilled?
Like, does the Japanese, like, it's, currently, it's jp.firework.com, which, again, isn't on Webflow.
This is technically, like, an entirely separate website.
Um,
What do they need?
They need their own sitemap?
Yeah, so one thing is, we can create a sitemap for them and we can get it indexed for as many pages as possible.
We'll get indexed, of the Japanese version.
This one.
Second thing, let me just check this one second.
So they've created a brand new website.
Like, it's not on Webflow, right, this one?
Yeah, I imagine their plan is to eventually retire some or most of this website and have it be on Webflow.
Because, again, I see them doing activities inside Webflow, but they must be doing it in a way where they're not, like, ready to launch.
Maybe they're going to launch everything all in one row.
I don't know.
They honestly don't really update me much on what they're doing.
Unfortunately, they don't even have the tech properly set up HF flag and everything is not set up on this.
I'm giving an insight that SEO tech HF flag and that is not set up.
Maybe that is something you can communicate to them, but yeah, Japanese is something that is generating good amount of searchers and clicks.
So Cameron, from the Japan team, who will be responsible for that?
Is that Nori?
He's like your counterpart, from what I understand.
So if I reach out to Nori, he should be able to give that work, give that task to whoever on his team is most appropriate, I would assume.
Okay, but let's add him to the Firework growth.
And Prateek, we also talked about translating blogs.
Have you thought about that?
How do we take that project on?
Again, the version, the language version of it, maybe some local person has to verify that.
If that is all good to go, then what we can do is we can take it in phases.
We can take the top-performing pages that we are generating right now.
We do it 50 pages.
We take a 50 sample size, actually, the top 50 blogs for the last one month which have donated the clicks.
That way, what happens is we check the indexing of those.
We are pushing 100 pages.
One is French and one is Spanish.
So we are going to push 100 pages at front for indexing.
We will check the indexing rate for it in a week's time.
Check out of the 100 pages how many get it.

Based on that, we published the next 50-100 that we have come from indexing, but then we will get somebody to review them quickly, like we were discussing it internally, so maybe you can help us identify those top 50 blogs and get them translated to begin with, and then from there we can maybe do like a review of five blogs a week or ten blogs.
We will see, like, how much bandwidth we have initially, but we can definitely get that done.
Got it.
Do you want me to share 50 or 10?
What would you suggest?
I think let's plan out for 50.

I'm not saying, let's start, like, you should identify 50 blogs that need to be translated to begin with, send us, like, 10 blogs in Spanish and 10 in French, and then let's see how much time do we need to be able to translate that.
If we are able to do it quickly for the next round, we can do 20 blocks, or 30 blocks also, but I want to make sure we start with 10.
I'll share your list of 50, which will, I'll remove the Easter campaign, those kinds of seasonal-based articles, I'll just keep at the evergreen topics, and I'll have that shared with you.
Okay, okay, let's do that.

Perfect, that's the only thing that I had in terms of agenda, I am pending on the topics, I'll be sharing that, maybe by tomorrow, my time in the morning, you should have them, that's your mid-minute or something like that.
Okay, and then there was one action item that Abhishek was talking about last week, which was how do we rank high on shoppable video?
Okay.
Shoppable video has a specific keyword, I'll do a complete audit.
That, and then also there.
Another action item on the reporting site on from which blogs are genetic, those are the things I'll be presenting on the Thursdays call.
Okay, okay.
Do you need me to pull the report now?
Because you would need data to be able to do that analysis, right?
Yeah, I'll be needing it maybe.
So let's keep some data in this fixer day range.
Yeah, let me know.
I usually pull probably for the last year or so, like I send you all the data.
So I think that should help you do all the analysis.
Agreed.
But if I take it too soon, I think we might lose some leads.
Okay, for this week.
Yeah, for this week, you won't get all the leads.
Okay, let me know maybe on Wednesday or Tuesday.
I'll just do it so that we have some more leads to show.
That's it.
Okay, let's do that.
Perfect.
Sounds good.
Okay, we'll sync up again.
Thursday, then, till then, Prateek, if you have updates on these action items we talked about, just post it on the Grotex channel, Fiverr Grotex channel, and we can take it from there.
I'll share the 50 blocks in another couple of minutes.
Okay, sounds good.
Thank you.
you.
Bye-bye.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss website SEO optimization, focusing on sitemaps and content translation strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to create sitemaps for vernacular languages, prioritizing Japanese due to high search volume](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Plan to translate top 50 blog posts to French and Spanish, starting with 10 each](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Japanese website (jp.firework.com) needs technical SEO improvements, including proper hreflang setup](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Action item: Analyze how to rank higher for "shoppable video" keyword](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)

## Topics

### Sitemap Optimization

  - [Currently have 3 sitemaps: overall structure, blocks, and entire website](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Proposal to add sitemaps for vernacular languages (French, Spanish)](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Delayed implementation for French/Spanish due to low translation percentage](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Japanese sitemap prioritized due to high search volume (296, 93, 163 clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Japanese website (jp.firework.com) not on Webflow, needs separate sitemap](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### Content Translation Strategy

  - [Focus on translating top-performing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Initial plan: Identify top 50 blogs, start with 10 each for French and Spanish](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
  - [Process: Translate, verify by local person, check indexing rate after a week](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Aim to translate 5-10 blogs per week after initial batch](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=508.0)
  - [Prateek to share list of 50 evergreen topics, excluding seasonal content](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

### Japanese Website Optimization

  - [Current Japanese site (jp.firework.com) not on Webflow platform](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Technical SEO issues identified, including missing hreflang tags](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Action item: Communicate SEO improvements needed to Nori (Japan team counterpart)](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)

### SEO Reporting and Analysis

  - [Prateek to present blog performance report on Thursday's call](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Ritesh to pull data (last year) for analysis by Tuesday/Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Analysis to include which blogs are generating leads](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Keyword Ranking

  - [Action item: Conduct complete audit for "shoppable video" keyword ranking](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Prateek to present findings on Thursday's call](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=594.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to share list of 50 top-performing blog posts for translation](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)
  - [Create and implement sitemap for Japanese website](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Cameron to contact Nori about Japanese website SEO improvements](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Ritesh to pull blog performance data by Tuesday/Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Prateek to analyze "shoppable video" keyword ranking](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)
  - [Prateek to post updates on Firework Grotex channel before Thursday's call](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Team to review progress on action items during Thursday's sync](https://fathom.video/share/mVd4TrxvmbRz8s_RXXPNoSDF_PhFEdaz?tab=summary&timestamp=659.0)

action_items.description: Contact Nori re Japanese website sitemap creation + HF flag setup
Initiate translation of 10 blogs each in Spanish & French from Prateek's list
ID + share list of 50 evergreen top-performing blogs for translation (excl. seasonal)
Conduct audit on ranking for "shoppable video" keyword
Prepare report on blog lead generation for Thursday call
Pull last year's lead data by Wed for Prateek's blog lead gen analysis
